description_long: This is a modern, two-story brick house with a gable roof and a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The front facade features large rectangular windows and a wooden door, with a paved area for parking and a tree adjacent to the driveway. The side views reveal a solar panel on the roof and a fenced backyard area, as well as a carport or covered parking space. The rear of the house has additional windows and a back door opening onto a paved patio, with a partial fence enclosing the yard. The roof includes a chimney and a skylight, adding to the contemporary design. The house is surrounded by a mix of hardscape and softscape elements, including pavement, fencing, and trees.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a gable roof, large windows, a driveway, and fenced yard, featuring both front and rear entryways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, parked car, and a tree to the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brick wall, solar panel on the roof, driveway, and carport area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, additional windows, paved patio, and fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear view of the brick wall, tree, and partial fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Single wooden door with a paved approach, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
